summary: Comprehensive SEO testing for P-Nice collagen e-commerce store completed successfully. All major SEO features, collagen-first homepage structure, and merchandising elements are working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Minor JavaScript date handling error in test automation (functionality works)

passed_tests: Backend API health check (16/16 tests passed - 100%)
Homepage meta title contains 'Premium Grass-Fed Collagen'
Hero section displays 'Glow From Within' messaging
Trust bar shows 'Types 1 & 3 Collagen', '100% Grass-Fed', 'Hydrolyzed Peptides'
Featured products section shows collagen-first with 'Foundation of Radiant Skin'
Product API returns SEO-optimized content with proper keywords
Unflavored collagen product shows 'Grass-Fed Hydrolyzed Collagen Peptides'
Product benefits contain SEO keywords (skin, hair, joint, collagen)
Rituals section merchandising works with 4 ritual cards
Night Repair cross-sell section appears with 2 skincare products
Product page navigation and SEO meta titles work
Add to cart, subscription options, and quantity controls function
Cart operations, checkout, and newsletter API work
